chapter_title.en: Chapter 19 – The one upon whom the Answering is delayed

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/84)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/84)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ إِنَّ الْمُؤْمِنَ لَيَدْعُو فَيُؤَخَّرُ إِجَابَتُهُ إِلَى يَوْمِ الْجُمُعَةِ .

en.hubeali: Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Ibrahim Bin Abdul Hameed, from Abu Baseer who said,
‘I heard Abu Abdullahasws saying: ‘A Momin supplicates, so its Answer gets delayed up to the day of Friday’.
en.sarwar: 6. Ibn abu ‘Umayr has narrated from Ibrahim ibn ‘Abd al-Hamid from abu Basir who has said the following: “I heard abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) saying, ‘A believing person prays and its (the prayer’s) acceptance may be delayed up to the next Friday [Day of Judgment].”’
